title: gridmason lint report
description: The single JSON object `gridmason lint --json` prints on stdout (SPEC §5, FR-7). Either a run report (checks ran) or an error report (the manifest could not be loaded). This repo owns this contract; the CLI's output validates against it.

RunReport.description: The report for a run that read the manifest and ran the checks.

status.description: `fail` iff any check result is `fail`; else `pass`. Mirrors the process exit code.

results.description: Every check finding, in check order — each tagged with the review tier it feeds.

tiers.description: The review tiers referenced by `results`, keyed by tier id — resolves each result's `tier` to its SLA.

ErrorReport.description: The report when the manifest could not be loaded — no checks ran.

code.description: Why the manifest could not be read; machine consumers switch on this.

Result.description: One check finding, echoing the check id and the review tier it feeds.

id.description: The stable dotted check id (`<group>.<slug>`, e.g. `manifest.schema`, `deps.acyclic`; the `--registry` checks add `capability.diff` and `deps.server-acyclic`).

hint.description: How to fix this finding; present on most non-pass results.

tier.description: The id of the review tier this check maps to; a key in the report's `tiers` catalog (registry §4.2).

Tier.description: A registry review tier (registry §4.1–§4.2): the stage a finding is reviewed under and, for a human tier, its flagship SLA.

sla.description: Flagship review SLA (`5d`); absent for the synchronous automated stage.
